since_last: 81% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.47%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.02% · BTC +1.39% · Gold -0.96% · Nasdaq100 +2.00%. 81% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.47%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.47%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.14%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +10.66%, AMAT +10.51%, LRCX +8.57%, PANW +8.06%, TSLA +7.10%. Laggards: HON -49.14%, DLR -1.94%, AAPL -1.18%, MSFT -1.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.16% at $159.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
